name: Pecan Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften the butter and mix it with an electric mixer with all ingredients except the pecans.
2. Add the pecans and spoon onto an unbuttered cookie sheet.
3. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
4. Frosting: Mix powdered sugar, milk, and a little vanilla until it has a drizzling consistency. Drizzle over cookies.
